ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "member_level" INTEGER /* Level of the member within the game */,
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* Faction ID the member belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the community */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the member's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the member (active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_faction_id FOREIGN KEY ("faction_id") REFERENCES factions ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the member associated with this performance record */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the member */,
  "joins" INTEGER /* Total number of successful joins made by the member */,
  "clears" INTEGER /* Total number of clears achieved by the member */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode in which the performance stats are recorded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the performance was recorded */,
  "average_session_time" INTEGER /* Average session time of the member */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions played by the member */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the member in a single session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factions" (
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faction */,
  "faction_name" TEXT /* Name of the faction */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faction leader */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the faction */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the faction was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the faction's characteristics and goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factions_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
